title: helichrysum phylicifolium
intro: Helichrysum phylicifolium, also known as the small yellow alpine daisy or alpine strawflower, is a flowering plant species native to the high-altitude mountains of the Himalayas. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, making it a popular choice for herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum phylicifolium are often used to promote relaxation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress.
